title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 17 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 17 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 17 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day, the main contract closed 676.5, an increase of 1.88% throughout the day. The quotationin the morning was increased by 20 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, steel mills continued to purchas on demand.
